ddls:
CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school district */,
  "state_id" TEXT /* Reference to the state the district is in */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the school district */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the district */,
  "superintendent_name" TEXT /* Name of the superintendent of the district */,
  "district_type" TEXT /* Type of district (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  "total_schools" INTEGER /* Total number of schools in the district */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the district */,
  "budget" REAL /* Total budget of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the school is in */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location description of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the principal of the school */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "total_teachers" INTEGER /* Total number of teachers in the school */,
  "student_teacher_ratio" REAL /* Student-to-teacher ratio in the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student attends */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the student */,
  "economic_status" TEXT /* Economic status of the student */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the student */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "english_proficiency" TEXT /* English language proficiency of the student */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the student */,
  "free_lunch_status" TEXT /* Free lunch status of the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teachers" (
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each teacher */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the teacher is assigned to */,
  "teacher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the teacher */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area taught by the teacher */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Years of teaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teacher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school that offers the course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area of the course */,
  "credit_hours" INTEGER /* Credit hours for the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who is enrolled */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "academic_year" INTEGER /* Academic year of the enrollment */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the enrollment (e.g., fall, spring) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test score */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who took the test */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the test */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date when the test was taken */,
  "test_type" TEXT /* Type of test (e.g., standardized, progress monitoring) */,
  "subject_area" TEXT /* Subject area of the test (e.g., math, reading) */,
  "test_level" TEXT /* Level of the test (e.g., elementary, middle, high) */,
  "raw_score" INTEGER /* Raw score achieved by the student */,
  "scaled_score" INTEGER /* Scaled score achieved by the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student who received the intervention */,
  "intervention_type" TEXT /* Type of intervention (e.g., tutoring, counseling) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the intervention */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the intervention */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school that initiated the collaboration */,
  "partner_school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the partner school */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., shared resources, joint project) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_partner_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)
